prompt: Create the final MVP room shell for OpenKitten World.
scene: A cozy lightly angled indoor room with open floor space for cats, one readable whiteboard zone, one readable cabinet zone, one readable inbox or notice zone, and a few atmospheric household objects.
subject: The final room shell only, no characters.
style: Polished 2D game background, clean stylized environment art, painterly-cartoon finish with thick clean contour lines and very readable silhouettes. Chunky browser-game shape language, compact forms, soft oval shadows, slightly angled 2D presentation.
composition: Single-screen gameplay background, central negative space, edge props balanced, no object blocking the center.
lighting: Warm indoor light, gentle softness, calm productivity atmosphere.
palette: Warm wood, cream, mossy green, dusty amber, muted teal accents, lower saturation than a bright arcade game.
materials: Wood planks, rug, paper, plaster wall, brass lamp, soft fabric.
constraints: No characters, no text, no UI, no logo, no watermark, keep the room readable for future sprite placement.
negative: Photorealism, over-rendered brush detail, noisy texture, clutter, high contrast darkness, outdoor grass scene, combat fantasy mood, neon arcade saturation.
